comment: CI-safe config. EXCLUDES every file that imports @ableton-extensions/sdk by NAME so `tsc --noEmit` passes with NO SDK present (the beta SDK is non-redistributable and never committed; see ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md §1/§4). That set is: the four SDK-touching adapter files (live-bridge.ableton, resolver, mappers, selection), the five context-menu command modules (each imports SDK types), and extension.ts (activate()). The SDK-FREE files stay in the CI typecheck (and so are still gate-covered): adapter/bootstrap.ts and adapter/write-queue.ts (node:/core only), commands/support.ts (core only), and webviews/** (the *.html text imports resolve to `string` via the ambient webviews/html.d.ts, no SDK). All the excluded SDK-facing code is typechecked LOCALLY against the real extracted types via tsconfig.live.json (gitignored). Keeping the SDK-free files included also means `tsc` always has inputs here, so the gate never trips TS18003 'no inputs'.
